Video.summary: Mamie Jaggers is one of the only single women in the mining town of Bullfrog, Nevada.
Video.title: The Little Bullfrog Nugget

Video.summary: Mary Helen Crosby conceals government papers in her umbrella to insure their safe arrival.
Video.title: The Lady with the Blue Silk Umbrella

Image.alt: The Lady with the Blue Silk Umbrella
The Lady with the Blue Silk Umbrella
The Lady with the Blue Silk Umbrella
The Lady with the Blue Silk Umbrella
The Lady with the Blue Silk Umbrella
The Lady with the Blue Silk Umbrella
The Lady with the Blue Silk Umbrella
The Lady with the Blue Silk Umbrella
The Lady with the Blue Silk Umbrella

Video.summary: Claim jumper Jennie attempts to jump the mining claim of Buck Hansen near Rhyolite, Nevada.
Video.title: Claim Jumpin' Jennie

Video.summary: The discovery of a nugget weighing 12 pounds causes an uproar in a California gold town.
Video.title: The Twelve Pound Nugget

Video.summary: An engineer negotiates a peace treaty with Natives refusing to let a railroad cross their lands.
Video.title: Husband Pro-Tem

Video.summary: Cowpoke Curt Morrison and pal Josh locate a spring on Native land soon to be opened to homesteaders.
Video.title: The Kickapoo Run

Video.summary: Two men fight to rid Virginia City of its corrupt judicial system.
Video.title: The Light on the Mountain

Video.summary: Two partner prospectors sell out to the wealthy Spencer Gates and their lives take different paths.
Video.title: To Big Charlie from Little Charlie

Image.alt: To Big Charlie from Little Charlie
To Big Charlie from Little Charlie
To Big Charlie from Little Charlie
To Big Charlie from Little Charlie
To Big Charlie from Little Charlie
To Big Charlie from Little Charlie
To Big Charlie from Little Charlie
To Big Charlie from Little Charlie
To Big Charlie from Little Charlie

Video.summary: Depositing his gold in San Francisco, a prospector encounters the temptations of the big city.
Video.title: Riggs and Riggs

Video.summary: Prospectors offer a friend shares in their mine if he'll marry the homely Aggie Filene.
Video.title: Million Dollar Wedding

Video.summary: Wagon train members oppose their leader's desire to observe Sunday as a day of rest.
Video.title: The Seventh Day

Video.summary: A grizzled old man charters a train to break the speed record between Los Angeles and Chicago.
Video.title: Death Valley Scotty

Video.summary: A miner turned lawyer falls in love.
Video.title: Whirlwind Courtship

Video.summary: Bandits board a gold-carrying ship and murder most of the passengers and crew.
Video.title: I Am Joaquin

Video.summary: The romance of young lovers is threatened by their feuding families.
Video.title: Halfway Girl

Video.summary: A recent widower wants a headstone.
Video.title: The Lone Grave

Video.summary: A condemned outlaw is offered his freedom if he helps capture his criminal friend.
Video.title: The Informer Who Cried

Video.summary: A tomboy changes her ways when she meets the handsome constable of a mining town.
Video.title: The Indiana Girl

Video.summary: An inexperienced young man hears about a planned ambush on the sheriff and vows to help.
Video.title: The Friend

Video.summary: A desert dwelling couple struggle with life in Death Valley.
Video.title: Dress for a Desert Girl

Video.summary: Life on the prairie is anything but easy for a newly married Swedish immigrant.
Video.title: Britta Goes Home

Video.summary: Two Americans on their way to Santa Fe are captured by Mexican troops and held prisoner.
Video.title: Bread on the Desert

Video.summary: Impoverished homesteader Aaron makes a discovery with the potential to earn a fortune.
Video.title: Green Is the Color of Gold

Image.alt: Green Is the Color of Gold
Green Is the Color of Gold
Green Is the Color of Gold
Green Is the Color of Gold
Green Is the Color of Gold
Green Is the Color of Gold
Green Is the Color of Gold
Green Is the Color of Gold
Green Is the Color of Gold

Video.summary: Jesse Martin stirs up a town: he claims there's a payload of gold lying right beneath Main Street.
Video.title: Gold Mine on Main Street

Video.summary: The story of how the Winchester repeating rifle helped to bring law and order to a new Idaho town.
Video.title: The Thirty-Caliber Town

Video.summary: A woman's love inspires an aspiring preacher to stand up to a bully.
Video.title: The Other Cheek

Video.summary: An alcoholic tries to sober up long enough to save the lives of his friend and his niece.
Video.title: Solomon's Glory

Video.summary: Best friends recently out of the U.S. Army use a card game to determine a decision about marriage.
Video.title: A Full House

Video.summary: Two outlaws devise a mining operation and finance it with stolen bullion.
Video.title: How to Beat a Badman

Video.summary: Lucia Darling moves to Montana to start a school but faces many challenges.
Video.title: Lucia Darling and the Ostrich

Video.summary: The honeymoon is over when Jim Dayton's wife stumbles onto his past.
Video.title: Jimmy Dayton's Bonanza

Video.summary: A convict is released from prison, but not released from his past.
Video.title: Tracy's Triumph

Video.summary: A physician courts disaster by aiding one of two feuding Natives.
Video.title: The Lady Doctor

Video.summary: Inspector Wesley Hull is determined to discover how postmaster Jack Reardon can sell so many stamps.
Video.title: The Biggest Little Post Office in the World

Image.alt: The Biggest Little Post Office in the World
The Biggest Little Post Office in the World
The Biggest Little Post Office in the World
The Biggest Little Post Office in the World
The Biggest Little Post Office in the World
The Biggest Little Post Office in the World
The Biggest Little Post Office in the World
The Biggest Little Post Office in the World
The Biggest Little Post Office in the World

Video.summary: Natives reject Christianity in this biographical tale of missionary priest Jean Baptiste Lamy.
Video.title: Saint of Travelers

Video.summary: Father de la Cuesta is curious why a deceased padre ordered a hand organ for the mission.
Video.title: A Gift from Father Tapis

Video.summary: A cook skims gold nuggets off miners while working at their camp and faces the penalty of hanging.
Video.title: Early Candle Lighten

Video.summary: As a nun aids a wounded robber, she learns he is a friend of the notorious Billy the Kid.
Video.title: Lost Sheep in Trinidad

Video.summary: A spectacular wrinkle develops around an aging marshal's refusal to wear glasses.
Video.title: Ton of Tin

Video.summary: Gold fever takes hold when Nellie learns that nuggets just lay on the ground in a remote area.
Video.title: The Angel of Tombstone

Video.summary: This tale of misadventure focuses on Frank Baum's penning of The Wonderful Wizard of Oz.
Video.title: The Wizard of Aberdeen

Video.summary: Red Eagle and Little Fawn fight an unscrupulous businessman to secure an army freight contract.
Video.title: The Contract
